home-auto-desc: Trusted guidance for buying and selling your vehicle in Bavaria.
home-bau-desc: Premium tiling, renovation and professional moving services.
auto-hero-title: Advisory for Buying and Selling Cars
auto-hero-desc: We guide you personally through buying and selling — independent, honest and with local Bavarian market knowledge.
auto-services-desc: Personal guidance for buying and selling your vehicle.
auto-services-page-desc: We guide you personally through buying and selling — independent, honest and with market expertise.
auto-svc1-desc: We help you find the right vehicle — market research, listing review and an honest assessment.
auto-svc2-desc: We accompany you to the viewing and speak independently about anything noteworthy — before you buy.
auto-svc3-desc: Market-based valuation of your vehicle using current data — a solid basis for buying or selling.
auto-svc4-desc: Advice on photo presentation, listing copy, pricing strategy and the right sales platforms.
auto-pricing-desc: Tell us briefly what you want to buy or sell — the first assessment is always free and without obligation.
auto-pricing-card-desc: First assessment by phone, email or WhatsApp — also in German, English, Ukrainian or Russian.
auto-why1-desc: Reliable expertise and years of experience with a wide range of brand vehicles.
auto-why3-desc: We answer fast and give you an honest assessment — no long waiting.
auto-why4-desc: No call centre. You speak directly with the person handling your case.
auto-cta-desc: Book your appointment now or ask us your question — we reply personally.
auto-leist1-desc: We help you find the right vehicle — from market research to listing review.
auto-leist2-desc: We accompany you to the viewing, look at the car together with you and speak honestly about anything noteworthy — independent of the seller.
auto-leist3-desc: Market-based assessment of your vehicle using current offers and comparison data — a solid basis for buying or selling.
auto-leist4-desc: Advice on photo presentation, listing copy, realistic pricing and the right sales platforms.
auto-leist5-desc: Talk to us by phone, WhatsApp or email — the first assessment is always free and without obligation.
auto-leist6-desc: We support you in German, English, Ukrainian and Russian — especially helpful for the Ukrainian community in Bavaria.
auto-leist-cta-desc: Get in touch — we'll advise you personally and free of charge.
auto-about-page-desc: Learn more about the team behind AlexGruppe and what drives us.
auto-about-intro-title: Founded out of a passion for cars 🇺🇦
auto-about-intro-p1: AlexGruppe was born out of the wish to offer fair, honest and competent advice on buying and selling vehicles in Bavaria.
auto-about-intro-p2: As a Ukrainian team with Bavarian quality standards, we combine special diligence and passion with clear, honest assessments. Every customer deserves an understandable evaluation — without jargon and without hidden costs.
auto-about-intro-p3: Today we serve customers from the entire region and are known for fast response times, careful research and personal accessibility.
auto-about-values-desc: These principles guide our work every day.
auto-about-val1-desc: We explain every recommendation in plain language. No step without your explicit consent.
auto-about-val2-desc: We work with up-to-date market data and follow clear, documented standards.
auto-about-val3-desc: Agreements are kept. Appointments too. Your time matters to us.
auto-about-val4-desc: Whether new or returning customer — everyone is treated equally well.
auto-about-tl1-desc: Started as an advisory service for the Eastern European community in Bavaria — fast and uncomplicated.
auto-about-tl2-desc: With growing trust we opened our first permanent location and expanded our advisory offering.
auto-about-tl3-desc: As a logical extension we opened the interior fit-out section — for the same reliable service in a new craft.
auto-about-tl4-desc: We keep growing while staying what we always were: approachable, reliable, professional.
auto-contact-desc: By phone, WhatsApp or email — we respond quickly.
auto-contact-page-desc: Write to us or give us a call — we'll come back to you with an honest first assessment.
auto-kontakt-info-desc: Choose the channel most convenient for you. We are usually reachable within an hour.
auto-form-intro: Fill in the form — we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
auto-form-message-placeholder: Briefly describe what you need or share the model/year...
auto-faq1-q: How quickly will I get a reply?
auto-faq1-a: Usually within 1–3 working days. For urgent cases we try to contact you the same day.
auto-faq2-q: How much does the first consultation cost?
auto-faq2-a: The first assessment by phone, email or WhatsApp is always free and without obligation. Costs only apply for an in-depth consultation or on-site accompaniment — always with a clear quote in advance.
auto-faq3-q: Which car brands do you cover for buying and selling?
auto-faq3-a: We advise across all brands — European, Asian and American market vehicles.
auto-faq4-q: Will you accompany me to the on-site viewing?
auto-faq4-a: Yes. On request we'll join you for the viewing, look at the car together and speak openly about anything noteworthy — before you make a buying decision.
auto-faq5-q: In which languages do you advise?
auto-faq5-a: We advise in German, English, Ukrainian and Russian — especially helpful for the Ukrainian community in Bavaria.
bau-hero-desc: Premium tiling, professional renovations and reliable moving service — all under one roof.
